title: Mallards [Cosmetic Addon]
description: Add mallards (ducks) to your game with CEM!
body:
Quack Quack Quack?
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oKIjleSb/images/43b4f6cfab805e3cdcd3faa13929adc43a81af09.png)

## Introducing Mallards!
This pack adds a special variant of chickens that includes custom models, textures, and animation!


Mallards naturally spawn on beaches, in rivers, and in swamps, or have a 10% chance of spawning randomly in place of chicken
Or they can appear by simply naming a chicken `Mallard`, `Duck`, or `Quack` with a nametag

### Installation:
1. Install OptiFine
2. Download this pack
3. Put it in your resourcepacks folder
4. Enable it
5. Make sure you have CEM (Custom Entity Models), and Random Entities enabled.
6. Enjoy!
